items.name: Midas
items.description: Local-first, eval-first memory for long-horizon AI agents — no LLM at ingest. Python SDK + MCP server with source-traceable recall, belief revision, selective forgetting, and reproducible benchmarks.

items.name: sherlock-agent-eval
items.description: A Sherlock Holmes board game as an LLM-agent eval

items.name: search_evals
items.description: 🔍 Evaluate web search APIs with our framework, testing accuracy and relevance across multiple AI agents and benchmarks for better information retrieval.

items.name: llm-finetune-eval
items.description: Benchmark a fine-tuned model against your frontier-API baseline — accuracy, cost per 1k calls, latency, format adherence. A fine-tune without a before/after eval is a vibe, not an upgrade.

items.name: finbench_agent-Multi_Agent_Business_Analyst_System
items.description: Open-source local financial-QA system for FinanceBench. Llama 3.1 8B + 8 deterministic libraries + LLM-briefing layer. $0 cost, 100% local inference, seed=42 reproducible. 20-node pipeline (ingestion → routing → retrieval → analysis). Active development — benchmark eval in progress.

items.name: SteeringBench
items.description: A tiny eval harness for testing coding-agent workflow discipline: steering docs, dirty worktrees, verification, and honest reporting.

items.name: patent_creator
items.description: Benchmark 驱动的专利交底书 AI Agent 工作台，支持结构化预览、多轮会话与 DOCX 导出

items.name: auto-harness
items.description: Automate coding agent loops with benchmarks, self-updating evals, and iterative prompt and tool fixes to improve task performance overnight

items.name: quaid-evals
items.description: Automated benchmark suite for Quaid memory system: DAB, BEAM, and gbrain-evals. Publishes historical results to GitHub Pages.

items.name: kimi-tools
items.description: Kimi K2 (Moonshot) system prompts for coding agents + an A/B benchmark harness (cline/opencode/pi) and SWE-bench Verified eval
